rows.purpose: Revenue capture by top-ranked predicted CLV customers. Used to show capture at the top 5%, 10%, 20%, 30%, and 50% cutoffs.

rows.purpose: Comparison of CLV regression models and metrics including RMSE, MAE, R2, revenue error, and ranking usefulness.

rows.name: clv_zero_spender_diagnostics.csv
rows.purpose: Diagnostic table showing predicted CLV assigned to actual zero-spend customers. Used to explain uncertainty around non-returners.

rows.name: forecast_model_comparison.csv
rows.purpose: Weekly revenue forecasting model comparison with RMSE, MAE, WAPE, sMAPE, revenue error, and selected model metadata.

rows.name: future_12_week_forecast.csv
rows.purpose: Future weekly revenue forecast generated by the selected model. Used for directional short-term revenue planning.

rows.name: kmeans_cluster_profiles.csv
rows.purpose: Segment-level customer profiles from the final KMeans model, including size, revenue share, retention, recency, frequency, and monetary statistics.

rows.name: monthly_revenue_series.csv
rows.purpose: Monthly aggregation of valid purchase revenue. Used mainly for trend context because only 25 monthly observations are available.

rows.purpose: Low-dimensional coordinates for visualizing customer clusters and inspecting separation between behavioural groups.

rows.purpose: Weekly aggregation of valid purchase revenue. Used by forecasting pages to visualize revenue trends and evaluate models over 106 weekly observations.
